name: human-agent-playground
description: Human + AI board games with Web UI and MCP integration.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @human-agent-playground/core && npm run build --workspace @human-agent-playground/game-xiangqi && npm run build --workspace @human-agent-playground/server && npm run build --workspace @human-agent-playground/web
scripts.check: npm run build --workspace @human-agent-playground/core && npm run build --workspace @human-agent-playground/game-xiangqi && npm run check --workspace @human-agent-playground/core && npm run check --workspace @human-agent-playground/game-xiangqi && npm run check --workspace @human-agent-playground/server && npm run check --workspace @human-agent-playground/web
scripts.postinstall: npm run build --workspace @human-agent-playground/core && npm run build --workspace @human-agent-playground/game-xiangqi
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @human-agent-playground/core && npm run test --workspace @human-agent-playground/game-xiangqi && npm run test --workspace @human-agent-playground/server && npm run test --workspace @human-agent-playground/web
